title: Torrubia obtusata
intro:
There is no plant called "Torrubia obtusata". However, I found that the correct name is Torrubia (or more specifically, the Torrubia genus belongs to the Rubiaceae family, and one of its species is Torrubia heterophylla). However, I found another plant called Torrubia, it's a genus of flowering plants, specifically a type of shrub native to the Himalayas and southern China.

Here is a paragraph about the plant Torrubia genus (note that the species Torrubia heterophylla is mentioned):

Torrubia genus is a type of shrub native to the Himalayas and southern China, known for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Torrubia include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
